inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $6.17M ÷ 188.006M weighted average shares (20-F Item 5 MD&A)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses operating cash flow ($6.17M FY2025), not reported net loss ($4.1M) which includes fair-value gains on gold-linked loan, short-term investments, and other non-cash items per MD&A. Adjusted net loss $1.7M shown as cross-check. Minimal sustaining capex at royalty holding company; royalty generator land proceeds credited against mineral interests excluded from Lawrence FCF₀.

optionality_gate.notes: No outstanding debt at 12/31/2025 after credit facility and debenture repayment; $75M revolver available. Lawrence owner-cash gate is low because producing cash is early-stage (~$0.033/sh OCF). Do not use GAAP book (~$3.11/sh equity) as dhando floor: royalty interests carried at cost/amortized cost, not fair value (20-F accounting policies).

bear.notes: Gold price mean-reverts from record 2025 levels; revenue concentration in four mines hurts if one operator stalls; share count dilution from royalty generator model continues

base.notes: FY2025 revenue +55% YoY; producing ramps at Borborema, Côté, Vares, Cozamin continue; land-agreement proceeds add to total cash but excluded from Lawrence FCF₀ [Assumption]

bull.notes: Development royalties (Canadian Malartic Odyssey, Pedra Branca Jan 2026) plus accretive M&A; gold price stays elevated; OCF scales toward adjusted EBITDA $9.8M run-rate

segments.label: Producing royalties & streams (Borborema, Côté, Vares, Cozamin, others)
segments.evidence: 79.7% FY2025 revenue from four properties; OCF $6.17M on 188M WA shares

segments.label: Royalty generator land agreements (38 properties)
segments.evidence: Total revenue incl. land proceeds $17.8M vs royalty revenue $15.6M FY2025; 9 new royalties added in 2025

options.label: Development-stage royalty book (Canadian Malartic Odyssey, Pedra Branca, non-producing portfolio majority)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Substantial majority of interests on non-producing properties per 20-F risk factors; Canadian Malartic 38.6% of assets; partial P-weighted overlay only
options.evidence: 20-F Item 4: Canadian Malartic only material SK1300 property; Odyssey ramp on schedule; Pedra Branca royalty acquired Jan 2026

options.label: Gold-linked loan & fair-value financial assets
options.base_terminal_rationale: Mark-to-market items drove FY2025 net loss volatility; loan principal repaid 2025; not recurring owner cash
options.evidence: 20-F MD&A: fair value gain on gold-linked loan; outstanding principal fully repaid during 2025

gaap_vs_fair_value.note: Royalty and streaming interests at cost/amortized cost; deferred tax liabilities on mineral interests $134M vs revenue $15.6M shows economic value not fully marked

segments_or_options.notes: Non-producing majority; Odyssey and Pedra Branca catalysts

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Full portfolio fair-value SOTP vs carrying value

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalty interests at cost/amortized cost; deferred tax on mineral interests $134M; equity $699M vs producing cash ~$6M OCF (20-F consolidated statements)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 20-F: substantial majority of interests on non-producing properties; Canadian Malartic Odyssey ramp; 56 royalties since Ely Gold deal, many pre-production

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single royalty holding company; adjusted EBITDA positive $9.8M FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Land agreement proceeds in total revenue $17.8M but partially credited against mineral interests; royalty generator model separate from producing OCF

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity stakes in Apex Silver and other operators from royalty-for-equity deals; fair value through P&L

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Borborema commercial production 2025, Côté and Vares ramps already in FY2025 revenue mix

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Producing mine ramps (Borborema start, Côté/Vares/Cozamin volume) plus royalty-generator land model adding pre-production assets
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Gold price decline from 2025 records or operator delay at concentrated top-four mines
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Canadian Malartic Odyssey and Pedra Branca royalties scale faster than base producing path

catalyst_paths.impact: Material asset (38.6% of balance sheet); operator Agnico Eagle advancing ahead of schedule per Feb 2026 release
New development asset; not in FY2025 OCF base
Commodity downturn plus dilution from equity-funded royalty generator; OCF stagnates near $0.03/sh

human_review_items: CIK 1834026 added to us_ticker_config.json during this refresh (was null at onboard)
Use development-option overlay vs GAAP book for sizing; book is not dhando floor

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
